summary: Long-horizon research primitive. Ports the Anthropic multi-agent-research-system pattern (decomposer → N parallel workers → synthesizer) on top of the local Claude Code CLI. Every worker gets its own context window; artifacts land in ~/.frontier/research/<sessionId>/.

commands.summary: Run a literature/web survey with an orchestrator-worker loop. Returns a synthesized brief + per-worker artifacts.
Load a topic from examples/research/watchlist.json and run the survey against its queries.
List recent brief sessions, or show one by sessionId.
